summary: Admin Place Order Custom Delivery Date feature fully tested and working. All 6 backend tests passed. The feature correctly: (1) accepts delivery_date field in YYYY-MM-DD format, (2) converts IST date to UTC midnight for storage (e.g., April 10 IST = April 9 18:30 UTC), (3) falls back to auto-calculated date when delivery_date is not provided or invalid format.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped as per request - this is a React Native Expo app, not testable via browser

success_rate.frontend: N/A - React Native Expo app, browser testing not applicable

seed_data_creation: Test orders created with delivery_date 2026-04-15 and cancelled after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Place Order delivery_date feature is complete. Backend API POST /api/admin/place-order accepts optional delivery_date field (YYYY-MM-DD format). When provided, it converts IST date to UTC midnight for storage. When not provided or invalid, falls back to auto-calculated delivery date based on 4 AM IST threshold.
